ogTitle: Tooperang vs Toorak Gardens: Climate Safety

heading: Tooperang vs Toorak Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tooperang, South Australia and Toorak Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tooperang has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Toorak Gardens (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tooperang or Toorak Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tooperang has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Toorak Gardens scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tooperang scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Toorak Gardens scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tooperang or Toorak Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tooperang has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
